warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x5 | Light Touch n Go
* Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E2MOM 12min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 50%
02:00 5 @ 60%
HOLD 5 Sets
04:00 5 @ 70%
06:00 5 @ 70%
08:00 5 @ 70%
10:00 5 @ 70%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
18 min AMRAP
15/12 cal Assault Bike
8 Box Overs @ 40/30"
10 Front Rack DB Reverse Lunges (@22.5/15kg)
8 Pull Ups

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Negative Pull Ups
AS SLOW AS POSSIBLE
If you can do more than 5, GO SLOWER
Scale to Jumping Pull Up, NO BANDS

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain and arm weaknesses while avoiding chest/shoulder fatigue from bench and pull-ups.

Workout | 18 min AMRAP

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 5 at 70 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: AMRAP 18 minutes: 15/12 cal Assault Bike, 8 Box Overs @ 40/30", 10 Front Rack DB Reverse Lunges (@22.5/15kg), 8 Pull Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, hamstrings, glutes.
